NOTE: Here connect whichever pre processors make sense for your input video
NOTE: Save the video from result of "Steer Video with Frame" and upload here so that we can get video info

The image shows a young woman standing in the ocean with her arms stretched out to the sides. She is wearing a white sweater with fringes on the sleeves and a black skirt with a floral pattern. Her long dark hair is flowing in the wind and she has a serious expression on her face. The background is filled with coral reefs and other marine life. The water is a deep blue color and the overall mood of the image is peaceful and serene.

nodes.title: Negative
widgets_values: 色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走

nodes.title: Manual Prompt
widgets_values: The image shows a young man standing in a field with tall grass and trees in the background. He is wearing a beige sweater with fringes on the sleeves and a black jacket with a floral pattern. He has long dark hair and is looking off to the side with a serious expression on his face. His arms are stretched out to the sides and his hands are clasped together in front of him. The overall mood of the image is somber and contemplative.
NOTE: Disable if anime style video ->

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: Replace the background with a clean underwater background with sea monsters. Maintain identical subject placement, camera angle, framing, and perspective.
